name: Fallmark Collective
specialty: Elite rift navigators, known for their exceptional ability to traverse the chaotic tears in reality with minimal casualties

members.name: Elysia Thorne
members.note: A scar running down her left cheek, a remnant from a close encounter with a rift beast

members.name: Kael Stryker
members.note: Known for his uncanny ability to follow trails in the most treacherous of terrains

visual: Elysia and Kael are dressed in durable leather armors, adorned with intricate symbols representing their successful rift traversals. They carry a variety of specialized tools and weapons that are a testament to their profession. They move with a calm and measured air, emanating an aura of experienced professionals.
reputation_note: Rumored to have navigated the most dangerous rifts in the Undercity without loss, the Fallmark Collective is a name whispered with both fear and respect among the city's inhabitants
